# Suggested GitHub repository topics

Set these on the repo **About** section on GitHub (Settings → General → Topics), or via `gh`:

```bash
gh repo edit baasith6/RepoGraph-Protocol --add-topic architecture,static-analysis,developer-tools,ai-tools,cursor,clean-architecture,dotnet,typescript,monorepo,github-actions,knowledge-graph,cli,openapi,code-quality
```

## Core

- `architecture`
- `static-analysis`
- `developer-tools`
- `knowledge-graph`
- `cli`

## AI / IDE

- `ai-tools`
- `cursor`
- `mcp`
- `vscode`

## Stacks

- `dotnet`
- `csharp`
- `typescript`
- `angular`
- `nodejs`

## Workflow

- `github-actions`
- `ci-cd`
- `monorepo`
- `clean-architecture`
